[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000000 1
1 00000000 a
2 00000100 1
3 01000001 2
4 00000100 1
5 11000000 2
6 11101010 5
7 10000000 1

01 10 10001000 2
12 21 10000000 1 match 0 7
23 32 10000010 2
34 43 01100000 2
45 54 00000000 a match 1
56 65 00000000 a match 1
67 76 01010000 2
70 07 01100010 3

13 31 10000000 1 match 0 7
24 42 00000000 a match 1

57 75 00000100 1 match 2 4

71 17 00000000 a match 1

36 63 11000000 2 match 5
47 74 01100000 2
50 05 00001000 1
61 16 10000001 2
72 27 00000010 1

26 62 10000000 1 match 0 7
37 73 01100110 4
